name: African Herbal Tea
description: A traditional herbal tea made from carefully selected natural ingredients to support everyday wellness.
directions: Steep one tea bag or one teaspoon in hot water for 5-10 minutes.

name: Natural Face Cream
description: A moisturizing face cream designed to nourish and protect the skin.
directions: Apply a small amount to clean skin twice daily.

name: Massage Oil
description: Natural massage oil for relaxation and body care.
directions: Massage onto the skin as needed.
